title: The Pet Store The Gorilla Tuff Floating Training Dummy for Throwing and Retrieval Games on land and in Water, Healthy Exercise for your Dog, Emperor Yellow
features: Designed for interactive fun for you and your dog, can be used in water or land-based retrieval games. Good fun for you and your dog playing tugging games
Textured design makes it easy for dogs and humans to grip
Made from tough durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber, dirt and dribble are easily washed off
Bright colours, easily visible to avoid lost toys. Floats in Water.
Part of an extensive range of dog toys from The Pet Store that are designed to keep your pets happy and healthy by encouraging stimulation and exercise
description: From the manufacturer Features Floats In water Textured design for grip Interactive fun for you and your dog Quality Ribbed design helps clean gums Tough rope carry handle Made from tough durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber Tough This Product is designed for all dogs including aggressive chewers, with its durable non-toxic Thermoplastic Rubber material and strong rope handle design it wont let you or your dog down! Floats on Water Perfect for retrieval games anywhere! Our Gorilla Tuff Floating Training Dummy floats on water ensuring the product will not get lost while playing retrieval games with your dog!
